content: pipecat-ai 1.5.0 (PyPI, released 2026-07-04). Relevant extras: webrtc (aiortc>=1.14.0,<2 + opencv-python), deepgram (deepgram-sdk>=6.1.1,<8), anthropic (anthropic>=0.49.0,<1), runner (fastapi, uvicorn, python-dotenv, pipecat-ai-prebuilt), websocket (fastapi), local (pyaudio). NO silero extra — onnxruntime~=1.24.3 is a base dependency, Silero VAD is in core. NO elevenlabs extra — ElevenLabs WS TTS uses core websockets>=13.1.
